title: The First $1,000
content: First time I had a thousand dollars saved? I cried. Not joking. Actual tears. It wasn't the money - it was proof that I could do it. That I wasn't broken. That it was possible. That's a feeling everyone deserves.
extended_content: I checked my account three times to make sure it was real. Four digits. For the first time in my adult life, I had a cushion. If something went wrong, I had options. That thousand dollars was worth more than the money - it was proof. Proof that I could change. Proof that the system worked. Proof that my future could be different from my past.
